mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_session_summary ( session_id, employee_id, agent_name, total_messages, total_turns, total_issues, total_skills, first_message_at, last_message_at, last_scan_id, last_updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{employeeId}, #{agentName}, #{totalMessages}, #{totalTurns}, #{totalIssues}, #{totalSkills}, #{firstMessageAt}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{lastScanId}, #{lastUpdatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE employee_id = VALUES(employee_id), agent_name = VALUES(agent_name), total_messages = total_messages + VALUES(total_messages), total_turns = total_turns + VALUES(total_turns), total_issues = total_issues + VALUES(total_issues), total_skills = total_skills + VALUES(total_skills), first_message_at = LEAST(VALUES(first_message_at), IFNULL(first_message_at, '9999-12-31')), last_message_at = GREATEST(VALUES(last_message_at), IFNULL(last_message_at, '0000-01-01')), last_scan_id = VALUES(last_scan_id), last_updated_at = VALUES(last_updated_at)

INSERT INTO dashboard_session_summary ( session_id, employee_id, agent_name, total_messages, total_turns, total_issues, total_skills, first_message_at, last_message_at, last_scan_id, last_updated_at ) VALUES
( #{summary.sessionId}, #{summary.employeeId}, #{summary.agentName}, #{summary.totalMessages}, #{summary.totalTurns}, #{summary.totalIssues}, #{summary.totalSkills}, #{summary.firstMessageAt}, #{summary.lastMessageAt}, #{summary.lastScanId}, #{summary.lastUpdatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE employee_id = VALUES(employee_id), agent_name = VALUES(agent_name), total_messages = total_messages + VALUES(total_messages), total_turns = total_turns + VALUES(total_turns), total_issues = total_issues + VALUES(total_issues), total_skills = total_skills + VALUES(total_skills), first_message_at = LEAST(VALUES(first_message_at), IFNULL(first_message_at, '9999-12-31')), last_message_at = GREATEST(VALUES(last_message_at), IFNULL(last_message_at, '0000-01-01')), last_scan_id = VALUES(last_scan_id), last_updated_at = VALUES(last_updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_turns), 0) FROM dashboard_session_summary WHERE last_scan_id = #{scanId}
